name: Arnold TradingView Overlay
description: Closed-trade rendering switched from TV long_position/short_position to simple green/red rectangles entry→exit (eliminates stacked stop/tp band soup); active trade still uses long_position for live R:R. Broadcaster caps closed trades to last 12 most recent within 12h and clamps each shape's chart duration to 30 min so long-running trades don't span the whole window.
